runtimeEnvRequirements.description: Optional Tavily API key. If absent, the tool falls back to direct web search.

skills.name: Tavily Search Skill
skills.description: Guide the agent to search the public web, cite sources, and explain no-result cases clearly.

runtimeEnvRequirements.description: Optional Tavily API key. When absent, the runtime falls back to direct web search.

agents.description: 公开的通用入口 agent，可在调试页直接发起对话，并在需要外部信息时调度 web-search-agent。
agents.systemPrompt: You are the general public entry agent for debugging and trial conversations. Answer directly when the request is covered by your own reasoning. When external or up-to-date information is required, delegate to the bound web-search-agent and summarize the grounded result clearly.

agents.description: Atomic sub-agent for grounded public web search.
agents.systemPrompt: When external or up-to-date information is needed, call searchWeb first. Base the answer strictly on returned evidence, cite URLs explicitly, and explain clearly when no reliable result is found.

envVars.description: Optional Tavily API key for web search
